title: A Letter from the Surface
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is a letter from the surface.
scene: The scene follows a letter from the surface, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if we don't do a thing, he's barely breathing!! He's dead either way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let him feel a little of the pain you suffered!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What's going on? I'm an important person...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you, of all people... I could never forgive even if I tried....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Throw your weapons aside, all of you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aladin! Where is the tenryu- Ubito?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I only just got here myself...

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Boss jimbe!! Mother just dashed out of the palace alone...!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: It's a kind of human, Shirahoshii ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of the... less pleasant types of human...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you not realise what this man has done to us...?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can hear the cries of your hearts. They are painfully clear to me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know it must be difficult... but no matter how much anger and hatred you bear towards these humans...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must not pass it on to the children....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: they must meet the humans for themselves, and make their own decisions!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell anything of this to the people of fish-man island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: of the tragedy that has befallen us!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: or of our rage towards the humans!!!

summary: A Letter from the Surface. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
